== Notes for [[Item:Q114990|Q114990]] ==

Berengária Fernandes De Lima (born De Baião)
MyHeritage Family Trees
Birth: 1200 - Portugal Death: 1272 - Narbonne, France Parents: Afonso Hermiges De Baião, Teresa Hermiges De Baião (Sol. Peres De Bragança) Siblings: Pedro Afonso De Baião, Ponço Afonso De Baião (Baião), Sancha Afonso De Baião, Lopo Afonso De Baião, <Private> Afonso De Baião

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
D. Beringeira Aff.o de Bayao casada corn D. João Fz de Lima o Bom tt.o de Limas $ 1 N 2
(NFP, 1941, Azevedos $ 117 N 7).

http://books.google.co.ve/books?id=fykAAAAAQAAJ&pg=RA1-PA144&lpg=RA1-PA144&dq=%22Juan+Fern%C3%A1ndez+de+Lima%22&source=bl&ots=0d7D2pxall&sig=P7VBbMKwE7za52-QhjUDvAqzVz8&hl=es&ei=Pr6rSomZHtDElAeV8OXABg&sa=X&oi=book_result&ct=result&resnum=2#v=snippet&q=%22Juan%20Fernandez%20de%20Lima%22&f=false

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
